hero.title: Design a bedroom you'll love—instantly.
hero.subtitle: Pick a budget, choose a style, and let NEXROOM generate a shoppable setup in seconds—optimized for your space and your wallet.

visual.title: Room intelligence preview
visual.subtitle: Smart analysis reads style, lighting, empty zones, and budget fit before generating a shoppable layout.

trust.title: Used by {{count}} users
trust.subtitle: Designers, students, and busy builders use NEXROOM to go from 'ideas' to 'done' faster.

testimonials.quote: I went from 'blank room' to a cohesive setup in minutes. The budget bar is surprisingly accurate.
testimonials.name: Mina K.

testimonials.quote: The style consistency is the killer feature. Everything matches without me hunting through 20 tabs.
testimonials.name: Alex R.

testimonials.quote: Perfect for quick iterations. Change one need, regenerate, done. Feels like a real product.
testimonials.name: Sam P.

updates.title: NEXROOM Updates
updates.subtitle: We keep improving the experience to turn rooms into complete, visual and ready-to-shop proposals.

items.title: Improved Smart Room Scan
items.body: The room analysis experience is now clearer, faster and more visual, helping users understand the potential of their space.

items.title: More structured recommendations
items.body: Suggestions are displayed in a more organized way, considering priority, style, budget and usefulness to support better decisions.

items.title: More complete room packs
items.body: NEXROOM is evolving toward full furniture proposals matched by style, space and budget.

items.title: Bilingual experience
items.body: The platform is now prepared to work in Spanish and English while keeping a consistent experience across both languages.

items.title: Ready for advanced visual analysis
items.body: The platform has been prepared for future, more precise visual analysis features while keeping the experience secure and stable.

items.title: Stability and performance improvements
items.body: Improvements have been made to keep the experience smoother, more stable and responsive across mobile, tablet and desktop.

why.title: Why NEXROOM
why.subtitle: Built for speed, taste, and budget reality—without the overwhelm.

features.title: Budget-aware by default
features.body: Every recommendation is price-tagged, with trade-offs explained.

features.title: Style that stays consistent
features.body: We keep materials, colors, and shapes coherent across the setup.

features.title: Fast iteration
features.body: Adjust needs and regenerate instantly until it feels right.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: NEXROOM was created to make designing a beautiful, functional and budget-aware room much easier.
about.mainText: NEXROOM is a project created by Denis Rudenko with a clear idea: helping people and companies turn rooms into complete, visual and ready-to-shop proposals.
about.trustText: Instead of leaving users lost between hundreds of furniture options, NEXROOM organizes the process: it understands the space, style and budget, then turns the decision into a clearer and more actionable room pack.

cards.title: Clear vision
cards.body: Turning undecided rooms into shoppable, coherent and attractive proposals.

cards.title: Built for real users
cards.body: Designed for people who want to improve their space without spending hours comparing options.

cards.title: Commercial focus
cards.body: Prepared to help companies turn inspiration into purchase decisions.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From idea to a shoppable plan—in three simple steps.

steps.title: Tell us your space
steps.body: Add room size, must-haves, and your style vibe. Upload a quick photo if you want.

steps.title: Set a budget
steps.body: Choose a target spend and priorities. NEXROOM balances comfort, aesthetics, and price.

steps.title: Get your plan
steps.body: Review the layout, color palette, and furniture picks. Tweak options until it feels perfect.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you want saved setups and deeper planning.

labels.dimensionsNote: Approximate dimensions for future fit validation.
labels.placementAdvice: Keep at least 70 cm of circulation clearance around the main path.

errors.imageTooLarge: The image is too large. Try a photo under 8 MB.
errors.readFailure: Could not read the room image.

alternatives.cheaperReason: Prepared cheaper alternative slot for catalog matching.
alternatives.premiumReason: Prepared premium alternative slot for upsell and comparison.
alternatives.smallSpaceReason: Prepared compact alternative if clearance is limited.
alternatives.otherStoreReason: Prepared alternate-store slot for future marketplace routing.

products.name: Low storage unit
products.reason: Uses an empty wall and reduces visual noise without consuming too much budget.

products.name: Warm ambient lamp
products.reason: Adds a second lighting layer so the room feels more finished.

products.name: Compact desk or console
products.reason: Creates a useful zone without blocking circulation or breaking the visual line.

basic.title: Functional basic pack
basic.summary: Solves light and storage with minimal spend.

premium.title: Elevated premium pack
premium.summary: Upgrades materials, visual presence, and durability.

spaceProblems: Exact measurements are missing for fit validation
room.summary: Room analysis ready: the space reads as a {{room}} with soft light and a {{style}} base. The recommendation prioritizes furniture that can become a shoppable pack, be validated by measurements, and adapt to budget.
room.nextAction: Confirm measurements and upload another angle to refine fit, cart, and visual planning.
room.layoutSummary: Suggested layout with a usable wall and circulation to protect.
room.naturalLight: Soft natural light with possible color shift.

zones.mainWallAdvice: Use low pieces to avoid visual weight.

layoutSuggestion.title: Protect main circulation
layoutSuggestion.description: Keep at least 70 cm clear before recommending large pieces.

visualMockupPlan.storageInstruction: Place centered on the open wall.
visualMockupPlan.lampInstruction: Place beside storage for side lighting.
visualMockupPlan.beforeAfterPrompt: Future before/after mockup: keep the original photo, add recommended furniture, and label circulation zones.

commercialSummary.packTitle: Your room ready in one shoppable pack
commercialSummary.readyRoomSummary: A balanced pack to organize, light, and add function without exceeding the budget.

warnings.measurements: Exact measurements are missing: validate width, depth, and clearance before buying.
warnings.measurementsAction: Add measurements or upload another angle.
warnings.lightColor: Photo lighting can alter the real color of furniture.
